behavior_summary: When the ENDGATE object is examined (U8P_ENDGATE::look/examine), the script displays a single short bark text "gate " to the player and then suspends the U8P_ENDGATE::look process.
There is no branching, menu interaction, flag reads/writes, or external calls — the handler is purely descriptive/scenery feedback.
The process type is 0x0208 (a U8P_ENDGATE::look/examine handler), so this runs in response to the game's U8P_ENDGATE::look/examine event for the item.
notable_control_flow: U8P_ENDGATE::look immediately emits a bark and then yields/suspends the process; control does not proceed to other logic in this script.
No conditional branches, menu nodes, or calls are present — linear one-shot behavior.
Presence of Unknown nodes in the raw suggests simple structural nodes around the bark (e.g., block open and a suspend), not additional logic.
open_questions: Does the suspended U8P_ENDGATE::look process ever get resumed by any external engine action (e.g., closing UI or resuming processes), or is suspend effectively an end for this handler?
Why does the bark text include a trailing space ("gate ") — is this concatenation with other text expected elsewhere?
Is this object also intended to be a fast-area trigger in other contexts, or strictly a U8P_ENDGATE::look/examine-only scenery item?

main_function.name: U8P_ENDGATE::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short descriptive text when the player examines the ENDGATE object: show the bark "gate " then suspend the U8P_ENDGATE::look process.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the engine's U8P_ENDGATE::look/examine event for the ENDGATE object (process type 0x0208).
Invoked when the player uses the 'U8P_ENDGATE::look' action on the item; inferred from classification and process_type.

function_map.name: U8P_ENDGATE::look
function_map.role: Display a single short description/bark for the ENDGATE when examined, then suspend the process.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: When the ENDGATE object is examined (U8P_ENDGATE::look/examine), the script displays a single short bark text "gate " to the player and then suspends the U8P_ENDGATE::look process.
